level_signals: 3-5 years' experience in an operational analyst position or equivalent
Senior analyst title with mentorship responsibilities
Reports to BP&A MIS Manager, not a people-management role

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3-5 years' experience in an operational analyst position or equivalent
Must possess extremely proficient SQL skills that are used on a daily basis
Highly proficient in building reporting using Tableau (and similar tools)
Build and maintain complex Tableau dashboards on a regular basis
Expertise in analyzing large datasets using SQL/Python and other statistical analysis packages to read test results and deliver on strategies to improve member contact and overall loss prevention

Proven analytical skills in conducting sophisticated analysis using customer performance data, bureau attributes and other 3rd party variables to solve business problems; a demonstrated ability to synthesize and communicate analysis to peers and senior management
Work closely with other MIS team members to help mentor and collaborate on improving current processes, databases, and tables stored in a Snowflake data environment
Responsibilities include preparing Google Slide presentations around Collections and Recovery insights, strategy changes, opportunities, and risks to senior leaders
Strong communication skills and an ability to provide technical guidance to less technical audiences.
Proven experience analyzing, interpreting, and summarizing complex data as it relates to financial services. BA/BS Degree required
A history of success in leading initiatives and driving results through collaboration and hands-on work
High attention to detail and strong data & root cause analysis

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong collections industry knowledge, including a sound understanding of relevant regulations like FDCPA, TCPA, FCRA and a working knowledge on the impact of CFPB's Reg F on the collections landscape.
A passion for well-tested code and utilizing testing frameworks
Experience in training or developing AI chat agents based on summarized Snowflake data

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska (due to insurance coverage issues)

scope.surface: Collections Center of Excellence (CCoE) — Business Planning & Analytics (BP&A) / MIS Tableau reporting across Credit Card, Personal Loan, and Student Lending collections lifecycle
scope.business_model: B2C national bank / fintech — collections and loss prevention across consumer lending products
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain complex Tableau dashboards on a regular basis
Develop and interpret MIS reporting for Credit Card, Personal Loan and Student Lending businesses
Prepare Google Slide presentations around Collections and Recovery insights for senior leaders
Lead the entire project lifecycle for complex data analysis, requirements gathering and creation of new production reporting
Mentor and collaborate with MIS team members on improving current processes, databases, and tables in Snowflake
Work with Dialer and IVR teams on OMNI channel reporting
Partner with data engineering, data science, and analytics teams to establish data sources
Develop performance measurements and analytical tools to improve operations
Analyze data to compile comprehensive pictures of overall business operational performance

green_flags: Specific tooling stack named (SQL, Python, Tableau, Snowflake, Google Slides) — clarity on day-to-day work
Clear reporting structure (reports to BP&A MIS Manager)
Mentorship and senior influence scope described — growth signals for the role
EEO and reasonable accommodations explicitly stated
San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance compliance noted
red_flags: Compensation range referenced but not disclosed ('base pay range for this role is listed below' — range missing from JD body)
Location type is ambiguous — JD does not specify city or remote/hybrid policy; only exclusion is Hawaii and Alaska
Posting date not available — unclear how long role has been open
